description: List. An almost entirely 'egalitarian' list of contributors from the first half of the eleventh century' (Goitein) Forty-four persons pledge 1/2 (dirham), nine parties, of whom six consist of two or more numbers, 1, and only one pledges 2 (dirhams). Almost all the names appear in abbreviated form: Abu Kathir is Efrayim b. Shemarya, the leader of the Palestinian congregation of Fustat (fl. 1007-1055), Sahlan (b. Avraham), the head of the Babylonians. Hillel hpns, that is, ha-parnas.. Others are referred to simply by nickname: 'Son of the Mule,'The Philosopher.' Dated to ca. 1035 recto has a letter from the orphans (girls) of Dosa, seeking help claiming their inheritance Ed. Gil, Eretz yisrael, II, pp. 402-403; trans Mediterranean Society, II, p. 324. (Information from Mediterranean Society, II, p. 504, App. C 121).
description_he: רשימת תורמים 'שוויונית' כמעט מהמחצית הראשונה של המאה ה-11. 44 אנשים נדבים חצי (דרהם), 9 קבוצות נדבו דינר אחד, ורק אחד נדב 2 דינרים. כ-1035. מזכיר את אבו כתיר (אפרים ב' שמריה) ואת סהלאן ב' אברהם.
